generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures cart motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance ElectromagnetStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures electromagnet status"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ElectromagnetStatusDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorPositionSensor
]

instance HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorPositionSensor
]

instance ElectromagnetStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ElectromagnetStatusSensor
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB for crane system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted, HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted, ElectromagnetStatusDataTransmitted
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia model for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization using Docker"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService, CraneBehaviorSimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage using TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance GantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneBehaviorSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneBehaviorSimulationService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedTrajectoryInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization via Grafana Dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight, ValidationResultsInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationResultsInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationResultsInsight, SendOperatorNotification
]

instance CraneBehaviorSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time state of the crane"
]

instance ValidationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
]

instance OptimizedTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectory for movement planning"
]

instance FaultLocalizationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization results for maintenance decisions"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data available for analysis"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from crane behavior simulation"
]

instance ThresholdBreachDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Threshold breach detected for operator notification"
]

instance SendOperatorNotification : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends notification to operator when threshold breach is detected"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in the port of Antwerp, moving small pucks representing containers between locations"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotorPositionSensor, HoistMotorPositionSensor, ElectromagnetStatusSensor, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet
]

instance CentralizedDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single centralized digital twin system composed of multiple services integrated within a unified architecture"
    base:contains OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService, CraneBehaviorSimulationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application (e.g., movement trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service) are sent via Python-based Physical Crane Interface to the motors and controllers, enabling precise movement of the cart and hoist."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation performed in real-time. Specific time rates not specified, but the system operates with continuous data streaming from sensors to database and real-time simulation/validation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integrated system where physical components (crane, sensors, controllers) interact with digital services via MQTT broker and Docker containers. Physical Crane Interface connects to Control Application and Logging Application; digital services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation) use database and dashboard for visualization and validation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all lifecycle stages: as designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360), as manufactured (physical hardware), and as operated (real-time data logging and validation during operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulation outputs, calculating distance metrics against thresholds; model validity assessed via confidence bounds derived from simulation (e.g., blue and yellow bounds in Grafana)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto broker for inter-service communication; Docker containers connected via a virtual network; data streamed from physical interface to database using TimescaleDB."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized services (TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, Grafana) deployed via docker-compose; Python gantrylib module installed via pip on a personal computer; all components run on a single host machine."
]
